Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jun-30-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Approve Administrator With Will Annexeds Creditor Claim ($31,801.02)
Off Calendar Oct-23-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Gina Podesta.

Mr. Siracusa addressed the Court's concerns regarding the Administrator's creditor's claim for the funeral expenses stating that they have always done it this way. The Court granted the Petition to Approve Administrator's Creditor's Calim (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-12-2019 Granted Per Written Order
